name: LV_223_01_STINVTOT_V2
definition:
CREATE VIEW [DBO].LV_223_01_STINVTOT_V2 WITH SCHEMABINDING
AS
  SELECT ST.STOCKREF AS STOCKREF,
         ST.SOURCEINDEX AS INVENNO,
         ORF.SOURCEINDEX AS ORFINVENNO,
         ST.DATE_ AS DATE_,
         SUM(
            ISNULL(
               DBO.LG_223_01_GETSTTRANSCOEF(ST.TRCODE,
                                  ST.IOCODE,
                                  ST.LINETYPE,
                                  0,
                                  ST.LPRODSTAT,
                                  ST.LPRODRSRVSTAT,
                                  0,
                                  ST.SOURCELINK,
                                  ST.BILLED,
                                  23)
               * (CASE
                     WHEN ST.PLNAMOUNT + ST.PORDCLSPLNAMNT >= ST.AMOUNT
                     THEN
                        0
                     ELSE
                        ST.AMOUNT - ST.PLNAMOUNT - ST.PORDCLSPLNAMNT
                  END)
               * (DBO.LG_223_01_GETUNITCOEF(ST.UINFO1, ST.UINFO2)),
               0))
            AS PLNPRODIN,
         SUM(
            ISNULL(
               DBO.LG_223_01_GETSTTRANSCOEF(ST.TRCODE,
                                  ST.IOCODE,
                                  ST.LINETYPE,
                                  0,
                                  ST.LPRODSTAT,
                                  ST.LPRODRSRVSTAT,
                                  0,
                                  ST.SOURCELINK,
                                  ST.BILLED,
                                  24)
               * (CASE
                     WHEN ST.PLNAMOUNT + ST.PORDCLSPLNAMNT >= ST.AMOUNT
                     THEN
                        0
                     ELSE
                        ST.AMOUNT - ST.PLNAMOUNT - ST.PORDCLSPLNAMNT
                  END)
               * (DBO.LG_223_01_GETUNITCOEF(ST.UINFO1, ST.UINFO2)),
               0))
            AS PLNPRODOUT,
         SUM(
            ISNULL(
               DBO.LG_223_01_GETSTTRANSCOEF(ST.TRCODE,
                                  ST.IOCODE,
                                  ST.LINETYPE,
                                  0,
                                  ST.LPRODSTAT,
                                  ST.LPRODRSRVSTAT,
                                  0,
                                  ST.SOURCELINK,
                                  ST.BILLED,
                                  26)
               * (CASE
                     WHEN ST.PLNAMOUNT + ST.PORDCLSPLNAMNT >= ST.AMOUNT
                     THEN
                        0
                     ELSE
                        ST.AMOUNT - ST.PLNAMOUNT - ST.PORDCLSPLNAMNT
                  END)
               * (DBO.LG_223_01_GETUNITCOEF(ST.UINFO1, ST.UINFO2)),
               0))
            AS PLNOTHERIN,
         SUM(
            ISNULL(
               DBO.LG_223_01_GETSTTRANSCOEF(ST.TRCODE,
                                  ST.IOCODE,
                                  ST.LINETYPE,
                                  0,
                                  ST.LPRODSTAT,
                                  ST.LPRODRSRVSTAT,
                                  0,
                                  ST.SOURCELINK,
                                  ST.BILLED,
                                  27)
               * (CASE
                     WHEN ST.PLNAMOUNT + ST.PORDCLSPLNAMNT >= ST.AMOUNT
                     THEN
                        0
                     ELSE
                        ST.AMOUNT - ST.PLNAMOUNT - ST.PORDCLSPLNAMNT
                  END)
               * (DBO.LG_223_01_GETUNITCOEF(ST.UINFO1, ST.UINFO2)),
               0))
            AS PLNOTHEROUT,
         SUM(
            ISNULL(
               DBO.LG_223_01_GETSTTRANSCOEF(ST.TRCODE,
                                  ST.IOCODE,
                                  ST.LINETYPE,
                                  0,
                                  ST.LPRODSTAT,
                                  ST.LPRODRSRVSTAT,
                                  0,
                                  ST.SOURCELINK,
                                  ST.BILLED,
                                  28)
               * (CASE
                     WHEN ST.PLNAMOUNT + ST.PORDCLSPLNAMNT >= ST.AMOUNT
                     THEN
                        0
                     ELSE
                        ST.AMOUNT - ST.PLNAMOUNT - ST.PORDCLSPLNAMNT
                  END)
               * (DBO.LG_223_01_GETUNITCOEF(ST.UINFO1, ST.UINFO2)),
               0))
            AS PLNWHOUSEIN,
         SUM(
            ISNULL(
               DBO.LG_223_01_GETSTTRANSCOEF(ST.TRCODE,
                                  ST.IOCODE,
                                  ST.LINETYPE,
                                  0,
                                  ST.LPRODSTAT,
                                  ST.LPRODRSRVSTAT,
                                  0,
                                  ST.SOURCELINK,
                                  ST.BILLED,
                                  29)
               * (CASE
                     WHEN ST.PLNAMOUNT + ST.PORDCLSPLNAMNT >= ST.AMOUNT
                     THEN
                        0
                     ELSE
                        ST.AMOUNT - ST.PLNAMOUNT - ST.PORDCLSPLNAMNT
                  END)
               * (DBO.LG_223_01_GETUNITCOEF(ST.UINFO1, ST.UINFO2)),
               0))
            AS PLNWHOUSEOUT,
         SUM(ISNULL(  DBO.LG_223_01_GETSTTRANSCOEF(ST.TRCODE,
                                         ST.IOCODE,
                                         ST.LINETYPE,
                                         0,
                                         0,
                                         0,
                                         0,
                                         ST.SOURCELINK,
                                         ST.BILLED,
                                         1)
                    * ST.AMOUNT
                    * (DBO.LG_223_01_GETUNITCOEF(ST.UINFO1, ST.UINFO2)),
                    0))
            AS TEMPIN,
         SUM(ISNULL(  DBO.LG_223_01_GETSTTRANSCOEF(ST.TRCODE,
                                         ST.IOCODE,
                               ST.LINETYPE,
                                         0,
                                         0,
                                         0,
                                         0,
                                         ST.SOURCELINK,
                                         ST.BILLED,
                                         2)
                    * ST.AMOUNT
                    * (DBO.LG_223_01_GETUNITCOEF(ST.UINFO1, ST.UINFO2)),
                    0))
            AS TEMPOUT,
         SUM(
            ISNULL(
               DBO.LG_223_01_GETSTTRANSCOEF(ST.TRCODE,
                                  ST.IOCODE,
                                  ST.LINETYPE,
                                  COALESCE(ORF.DORESERVE, -1),
                                  COALESCE(ORF.CLOSED, 0),
                                  0,
                                  0,
                                  ST.SOURCELINK,
                                  ST.BILLED,
                                  18)
               * STSHP.SHIPPEDRSRVAMT,0))
            AS RESERVED,
         SUM(
            ISNULL(
               DBO.LG_223_01_GETSTTRANSCOEF(ST.TRCODE,
                                  ST.IOCODE,
                                  ST.LINETYPE,
                                  COALESCE(ORF.DORESERVE, -1),
                                  0,
                                  0,
                                  0,
                                  ST.SOURCELINK,
                                  ST.BILLED,
                                  19)
               * STSHP.SHIPPEDAMOUNT,0))
            AS ACTPORDER,
         SUM(ISNULL(  DBO.LG_223_01_GETSTTRANSCOEF(ST.TRCODE,
                                         ST.IOCODE,
                                         ST.LINETYPE,
                                         COALESCE(ORF.DORESERVE, -1),
                                         0,
                                         0,
                                         0,
                                         ST.SOURCELINK,
                                         ST.BILLED,
                                         20)
                    * ST.AMOUNT
                    * (DBO.LG_223_01_GETUNITCOEF(ST.UINFO1, ST.UINFO2)),
                    0))
            AS RECEIVED,
         SUM(ISNULL(  DBO.LG_223_01_GETSTTRANSCOEF(ST.TRCODE,
                                         ST.IOCODE,
                                         ST.LINETYPE,
                                         0,
                                         ST.LPRODSTAT,
                                         ST.LPRODRSRVSTAT,
                                         0,
                                         ST.SOURCELINK,
                                         ST.BILLED,
                                         3)
                    * ST.AMOUNT
                    * (DBO.LG_223_01_GETUNITCOEF(ST.UINFO1, ST.UINFO2)),
                    0))
            AS ACTPRODIN,
         SUM(ISNULL(  DBO.LG_223_01_GETSTTRANSCOEF(ST.TRCODE,
                                         ST.IOCODE,
                                         ST.LINETYPE,
                                         0,
                                         ST.LPRODSTAT,
                                         ST.LPRODRSRVSTAT,
                                         0,
                                         ST.SOURCELINK,
                                         ST.BILLED,
                                         4)
                    * ST.AMOUNT
                    * (DBO.LG_223_01_GETUNITCOEF(ST.UINFO1, ST.UINFO2)),
                    0))
            AS ACTOTHERIN,
         SUM(
            ISNULL(
               DBO.LG_223_01_GETSTTRANSCOEF(ST.TRCODE,
                                  ST.IOCODE,
                                  ST.LINETYPE,
                                  COALESCE(ORF.DORESERVE, -1),
                                  0,
                                  0,
                                  0,
                                  ST.SOURCELINK,
                                  ST.BILLED,
                                  21)
               *STSHP.SHIPPEDAMOUNT,0))
            AS ACTSORDER,
         SUM(ISNULL(  DBO.LG_223_01_GETSTTRANSCOEF(ST.TRCODE,
                                         ST.IOCODE,
                                         ST.LINETYPE,
                                         COALESCE(ORF.DORESERVE, -1),
                                         0,
                                         0,
                                         0,
                                         ST.SOURCELINK,
                                         ST.BILLED,
                                         22)
                    * ST.AMOUNT
                    * (DBO.LG_223_01_GETUNITCOEF(ST.UINFO1, ST.UINFO2)),
                    0))
            AS SHIPPED,
         SUM(ISNULL(  DBO.LG_223_01_GETSTTRANSCOEF(ST.TRCODE,
                                         ST.IOCODE,
                                         ST.LINETYPE,
                                         0,
                                         ST.LPRODSTAT,
                                         ST.LPRODRSRVSTAT,
                                         0,
                                         ST.SOURCELINK,
                                         ST.BILLED,
                                         5)
                    * ST.AMOUNT
                    * (DBO.LG_223_01_GETUNITCOEF(ST.UINFO1, ST.UINFO2)),
                    0))
            AS ACTWASTE,
         SUM(ISNULL(  DBO.LG_223_01_GETSTTRANSCOEF(ST.TRCODE,
                                         ST.IOCODE,
                                         ST.LINETYPE,
                                         0,
                                         ST.LPRODSTAT,
                                         ST.LPRODRSRVSTAT,
                                         0,
                                         ST.SOURCELINK,
                                         ST.BILLED,
                                         6)
                    * ST.AMOUNT
                    * (DBO.LG_223_01_GETUNITCOEF(ST.UINFO1, ST.UINFO2)),
                    0))
            AS ACTOTHEROUT,
         SUM(ISNULL(  DBO.LG_223_01_GETSTTRANSCOEF(ST.TRCODE,
                                         ST.IOCODE,
                                         ST.LINETYPE,
                                         0,
                                         0,
                                         0,
                                         0,
                                         ST.SOURCELINK,
                                         ST.BILLED,
                                         7)
                    * ST.AMOUNT
                    * (DBO.LG_223_01_GETUNITCOEF(ST.UINFO1, ST.UINFO2)),
                    0))
            AS TRANSFERRED,
         SUM(ISNULL(DBO.LG_223_01_GETSTTRANSCOEF(ST.TRCODE,
                                       ST.IOCODE,
                                       ST.LINETYPE,
                                       0,
                                       0,
                                       0,
                                       0,
                                       ST.SOURCELINK,
                                       ST.BILLED,
                                       17)
                    * (ST.LINENET+ST.DIFFPRICE),
                    0))
            AS AVGVALUE,
         SUM(
            ISNULL(
                 DBO.LG_223_01_GETSTTRANSCOEF(ST.TRCODE,
                                    ST.IOCODE,
                                    ST.LINETYPE,
                                    0,
                                    0,
                                    0,
                                    0,
                                    ST.SOURCELINK,
                                    ST.BILLED,
                                    17)
               * (CASE WHEN ST.REPORTRATE = 0 THEN 0 ELSE (ST.LINENET+ST.DIFFPRICE) END)
               / (CASE WHEN ST.REPORTRATE = 0 THEN 1 ELSE ST.REPORTRATE END),
               0))
            AS AVGCURRVAL,
         SUM(ISNULL(  DBO.LG_223_01_GETSTTRANSCOEF(ST.TRCODE,
                                         ST.IOCODE,
                                         ST.LINETYPE,
                                         0,
                                         0,
                                         0,
                                         0,
                                         ST.SOURCELINK,
                                         ST.BILLED,
                                         8)
                    * ST.AMOUNT
                    * (DBO.LG_223_01_GETUNITCOEF(ST.UINFO1, ST.UINFO2)),
                    0))
            AS PURAMNT,
         SUM(ISNULL(DBO.LG_223_01_GETSTTRANSCOEF(ST.TRCODE,
                                       ST.IOCODE,
                                       ST.LINETYPE,
                                       0,
                                       0,
                                       0,
                                       0,
                                       ST.SOURCELINK,
                                       ST.BILLED,
                                       9)
                    * (ST.LINENET+ST.DIFFPRICE),
                    0))
            AS PURCASH,
         SUM(
            ISNULL(
                 DBO.LG_223_01_GETSTTRANSCOEF(ST.TRCODE,
                                    ST.IOCODE,
                                    ST.LINETYPE,
                                    0,
                                    0,
                                    0,
                                    0,
                                    ST.SOURCELINK,
                                    ST.BILLED,
                                    9)
               * (CASE WHEN ST.REPORTRATE = 0 THEN 0 ELSE (ST.LINENET+ST.DIFFPRICE) END)
               / (CASE WHEN ST.REPORTRATE = 0 THEN 1 ELSE ST.REPORTRATE END),
               0))
            AS PURCURR,
         SUM(ISNULL(  DBO.LG_223_01_GETSTTRANSCOEF(ST.TRCODE,
                                         ST.IOCODE,
                                         ST.LINETYPE,
                                         0,
                                         0,
                                         0,
                                         0,
                                         ST.SOURCELINK,
                                         ST.BILLED,
                                         10)
                    * ST.AMOUNT
                    * (DBO.LG_223_01_GETUNITCOEF(ST.UINFO1, ST.UINFO2)),
                    0))
            AS SALAMNT,
         SUM(ISNULL(DBO.LG_223_01_GETSTTRANSCOEF(ST.TRCODE,
                                       ST.IOCODE,
                                       ST.LINETYPE,
                                       0,
                                       0,
                                       0,
                                       0,
                                       ST.SOURCELINK,
                                       ST.BILLED,
                                       11)
                    * (ST.LINENET+ST.DIFFPRICE),
                    0))
            AS SALCASH,
         SUM(
            ISNULL(
                 DBO.LG_223_01_GETSTTRANSCOEF(ST.TRCODE,
                                    ST.IOCODE,
                                    ST.LINETYPE,
                                    0,
                                    0,
                                    0,
                                    0,
                                    ST.SOURCELINK,
                                    ST.BILLED,
                                    11)
               * (CASE WHEN ST.REPORTRATE = 0 THEN 0 ELSE (ST.LINENET+ST.DIFFPRICE) END)
               / (CASE WHEN ST.REPORTRATE = 0 THEN 1 ELSE ST.REPORTRATE END),
               0))
            AS SALCURR,
         SUM(ISNULL(  DBO.LG_223_01_GETSTTRANSCOEF(ST.TRCODE,
                                         ST.IOCODE,
                                         ST.LINETYPE,
                                         0,
                                         ST.LPRODSTAT,
                                         ST.LPRODRSRVSTAT,
                                         0,
                                         ST.SOURCELINK,
                                         ST.BILLED,
                                         12)
                    * ST.AMOUNT
                    * (DBO.LG_223_01_GETUNITCOEF(ST.UINFO1, ST.UINFO2)),
                    0))
            AS ONHAND,
         SUM(ISNULL(  DBO.LG_223_01_GETSTTRANSCOEF(ST.TRCODE,
                                         ST.IOCODE,
                                         ST.LINETYPE,
                                         0,
                                         ST.LPRODSTAT,
                                         ST.LPRODRSRVSTAT,
                                         0,
                                         ST.SOURCELINK,
                                         ST.BILLED,
                                         13)
                    * ST.AMOUNT
                    * (DBO.LG_223_01_GETUNITCOEF(ST.UINFO1, ST.UINFO2)),
                    0))
            AS ACTWHOUSEIN,
         SUM(ISNULL(  DBO.LG_223_01_GETSTTRANSCOEF(ST.TRCODE,
                                         ST.IOCODE,
                                         ST.LINETYPE,
                                         0,
                                         ST.LPRODSTAT,
                                         ST.LPRODRSRVSTAT,
                                         0,
                                         ST.SOURCELINK,
                                         ST.BILLED,
                                         14)
                    * ST.AMOUNT
                    * (DBO.LG_223_01_GETUNITCOEF(ST.UINFO1, ST.UINFO2)),
                    0))
            AS ACTWHOUSEOUT,
         SUM(ISNULL(  DBO.LG_223_01_GETSTTRANSCOEF(ST.TRCODE,
                                         ST.IOCODE,
                                         ST.LINETYPE,
                                         0,
                                         0,
                                         0,
                                         0,
                                         ST.SOURCELINK,
                                         ST.BILLED,
                                         15)
                    * ST.AMOUNT
                    * (DBO.LG_223_01_GETUNITCOEF(ST.UINFO1, ST.UINFO2)),
                    0))
            AS COUNTADD,
         SUM(ISNULL(  DBO.LG_223_01_GETSTTRANSCOEF(ST.TRCODE,
                                         ST.IOCODE,
                                         ST.LINETYPE,
                                         0,
                                         0,
                                         0,
                                         0,
                                         ST.SOURCELINK,
                                         ST.BILLED,
                                         16)
                    * ST.AMOUNT
                    * (DBO.LG_223_01_GETUNITCOEF(ST.UINFO1, ST.UINFO2)),
                    0))
            AS COUNTDEC,
         SUM(ISNULL(  DBO.LG_223_01_GETSTTRANSCOEF(ST.TRCODE,
                                         ST.IOCODE,
                                         ST.LINETYPE,
                                         0,
                                         0,
                                         0,
                                         ST.DISTORDLINEREF,
                                         ST.SOURCELINK,
                                         ST.BILLED,
                                         25)
                    * ST.AMOUNT
                    * (DBO.LG_223_01_GETUNITCOEF(ST.UINFO1, ST.UINFO2)),
                    0))
            AS ONVEHICLE,
         ST.VARIANTREF AS VARIANTREF,
         SUM(
            ISNULL(
               DBO.LG_223_01_GETSTTRANSCOEF(ST.TRCODE,
                                  ST.IOCODE,
                                  ST.LINETYPE,
                                  0,
                                  ST.LPRODSTAT,
                                  ST.LPRODRSRVSTAT,
                                  0,
                                  ST.SOURCELINK,
                                  ST.BILLED,
                                  30)
               * (CASE
                     WHEN ST.PLNAMOUNT + ST.PLNUNRSRVAMOUNT + ST.PORDCLSPLNUNRSRVAMNT >= ST.AMOUNT
                     THEN
                        0
                     ELSE
                        ST.AMOUNT - ST.PLNUNRSRVAMOUNT - ST.PORDCLSPLNUNRSRVAMNT - ST.PLNAMOUNT
                  END)
               * (DBO.LG_223_01_GETUNITCOEF(ST.UINFO1, ST.UINFO2)),
               0))
            AS PLNRSRVPRODIN,
         SUM(
            ISNULL(
               DBO.LG_223_01_GETSTTRANSCOEF(ST.TRCODE,
                                  ST.IOCODE,
                                  ST.LINETYPE,
                                  0,
                                  ST.LPRODSTAT,
                                  ST.LPRODRSRVSTAT,
                                  0,
                                  ST.SOURCELINK,
                                  ST.BILLED,
                                  31)
               * (CASE
                     WHEN ST.PLNAMOUNT + ST.PLNUNRSRVAMOUNT + ST.PORDCLSPLNUNRSRVAMNT >= ST.AMOUNT
                     THEN
                        0
                     ELSE
                        ST.AMOUNT - ST.PLNUNRSRVAMOUNT - ST.PORDCLSPLNUNRSRVAMNT - ST.PLNAMOUNT
                  END)
               * (DBO.LG_223_01_GETUNITCOEF(ST.UINFO1, ST.UINFO2)),
               0))
            AS PLNRSRVPRODOUT,
         SUM(
            ISNULL(
               DBO.LG_223_01_GETSTTRANSCOEF(ST.TRCODE,
                                  ST.IOCODE,
                                  ST.LINETYPE,
                                  0,
                                  ST.LPRODSTAT,
                                  ST.LPRODRSRVSTAT,
                                  0,
                                  ST.SOURCELINK,
                                  ST.BILLED,
                                  32)
               * (CASE
                     WHEN ST.PLNAMOUNT + ST.PLNUNRSRVAMOUNT + ST.PORDCLSPLNUNRSRVAMNT >= ST.AMOUNT
                     THEN
                        0
                     ELSE
                        ST.AMOUNT - ST.PLNUNRSRVAMOUNT - ST.PORDCLSPLNUNRSRVAMNT - ST.PLNAMOUNT
                  END)
               * (DBO.LG_223_01_GETUNITCOEF(ST.UINFO1, ST.UINFO2)),
               0))
            AS PLNRSRVWHOUSEIN,
         SUM(
            ISNULL(
               DBO.LG_223_01_GETSTTRANSCOEF(ST.TRCODE,
                                  ST.IOCODE,
                                  ST.LINETYPE,
                                  0,
                                  ST.LPRODSTAT,
                                  ST.LPRODRSRVSTAT,
                                  0,
                                  ST.SOURCELINK,
                                  ST.BILLED,
                                  33)
               * (CASE
                     WHEN ST.PLNAMOUNT + ST.PLNUNRSRVAMOUNT + ST.PORDCLSPLNUNRSRVAMNT >= ST.AMOUNT
                     THEN
                        0
                     ELSE
                        ST.AMOUNT - ST.PLNUNRSRVAMOUNT - ST.PORDCLSPLNUNRSRVAMNT - ST.PLNAMOUNT
                  END)
               * (DBO.LG_223_01_GETUNITCOEF(ST.UINFO1, ST.UINFO2)),
               0))
            AS PLNRSRVWHOUSEOUT,
         SUM(ISNULL(  DBO.LG_223_01_GETSTTRANSCOEF(ST.TRCODE,
                                         ST.IOCODE,
                                         ST.LINETYPE,
                                         0,
                                         ST.LPRODSTAT,
                                         ST.LPRODRSRVSTAT,
                                         0,
                                         ST.SOURCELINK,
                                         ST.BILLED,
                                         17)
                    * ST.AMOUNT
                    * (DBO.LG_223_01_GETUNITCOEF(ST.UINFO1, ST.UINFO2)),
                    0))
            AS ONHAND_AVG,
         (CASE WHEN ST.LINETYPE IN (4,11) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS TYP,
         COUNT_BIG(*) AS CNT
    FROM    [DBO].LG_223_01_STLINE ST
         INNER JOIN
            [DBO].LG_223_01_ORFLINE ORF
         ON (ST.ORDTRANSREF = ORF.LOGICALREF)
         INNER JOIN
            [DBO].LG_223_01_STSHIPPEDAMOUNT STSHP
         ON (ST.LOGICALREF = STSHP.TRANSREF)
   WHERE (    ST.CANCELLED = 0
          AND ST.STATUS = 0
          AND ST.ORDTRANSREF <> 0
          AND ST.STOCKREF <> 0
          AND ST.LINETYPE NOT IN (2, 3, 7))
         AND NOT ((ST.TRCODE IN (5, 10) AND ST.STFICHEREF = 0))
GROUP BY ST.STOCKREF,
         ST.DATE_,
         ST.SOURCEINDEX,
         ORF.SOURCEINDEX,
         ST.VARIANTREF,
         (CASE WHEN ST.LINETYPE IN (4,11) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
